page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg5s.24xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. This instance features 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core configuration. It is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced memory-to-core ratio of 4.0 GB per core. The underlying virtualization is managed via the KVM hypervisor.

This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external block storage options. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. The absence of hyperthreading ensures dedicated execution resources per vCPU, which eliminates resource contention between threads but limits the total concurrent thread count compared to hyperthreaded alternatives. Additionally, this instance does not feature any GPU acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.ebmg5s.24xlarge offers a high density of dedicated physical cores and a balanced memory allocation, making it suitable for workloads requiring predictable CPU execution without the overhead of shared-core or hyperthreaded environments. Appropriate workloads include large-scale web serving, enterprise applications, general-purpose backend processing, and distributed systems that benefit from a 1:4 CPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated physical compute resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg5s.24xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose server instance utilizing the KVM hypervisor. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz, delivering 96 dedicated physical cores and 96 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio. It features a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring external block storage for data persistence. This hardware profile is designed for workloads that demand dedicated physical compute resources without hyperthreading overhead. It is suitable for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and general-purpose backend processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg5s.24xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 cores, 384.0 GB of RAM, 32 Gbps network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated physical core instance featuring a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio and high-speed networking for predictable enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 96 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8163 cores with single-thread execution.
384.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio.
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput connectivity.
No local storage included, requiring external network-attached block storage.
KVM hypervisor virtualization with dedicated CPU allocation.
Suited for enterprise applications, distributed systems, and web serving.
